results.title: Getting the most from your garden
results.brief_description: Demonstrates the principles of raised-bed gardening for successful vegetable growing,. Shows double digging, the use of fertilizers, the type of gardening implements to use, the rotation of crops and the approach to the control of garden pests.

results.title: Getting the best out of hardware
results.brief_description: Summary: a great deal of expensive computer time can be wasted in running programs. shows where this time is wasted and how it can be saved by The Use of Operating Systems. The film includes demonstrations of the operator action required to set up and run three jobs with and without a simple batch operation system. slow motion film of card reader and line printer mechanisms reveal that a major source of time wasting is in input/ output operations. the film ends using a special model to show the principle behind a multiprogramming operating system

results.title: Getting straight
results.brief_description: A cinema verite style documentary that follows three people going through their last days in detoxification clinics prior to re-entry into the community. This program gives a clear insight into the treatment and philosophies of Alcoholics Anonymous in their dealings with alcoholics and drug dependent persons.

results.title: Getting ready to read (TEFC)
results.brief_description: This film examines the role that parents can play in helping their children to read. Reading is just one part of literacy so this role begins in the earliest months of a baby’s life. Methods of reading in schools are also examined.

results.title: Getting court
results.creator_credit: David Tiley, Debra Annear and Mozo Films
results.brief_description: Tony is involved in car crash and required to appear in court, charged with careless driving. This program explains what is involved in the process and includes helpful advice from a magistrate on what to expect and how to prepare for a court appearance.

results.title: Getting court
results.brief_description: Shayne steals a car and is charged with car theft and drunk driving. His friend encourages him to seek legal aid and we follow him into court. An excellent program on stealing and the law.

results.title: Getting a handle on stress with Heidi Di Santo
results.brief_description: Stress is a part of most people’s lives and can be traced back to the fight or flight instincts in prehistoric days. Today this problem is confounded by the fact that we are not as reliant on the fight or flight mechanism, and the societal pressures that contribute to stress levels. This program covers areas such as the effects of long term stress, telltale signs that you are suffering from stress, the importance of identifying how you individually react to stress. It also interviews people who have suffered from serious stress and how it has affected their lifestyle, as well as covering the areas of relaxation, disassociation, sleep, exercise, diet, and the dynamic relationship between thought, feeling and reaction. The video is designed to be integrated with the teachers guide and participant workbooks (available as a separate loan item), as part of a 2-4 hour training session on handling stress.

results.title: Get us kids out of here (TEFC)
results.brief_description: A study of the context in which young people offend and some of the offences that they commit. The program is introduced by Laurie Taylor, Professor of Sociology at the University of York, and it includes contributions from a wide range of specialists in the subject, as well as the case histories of several young offenders.
